primary.name: Black
primary.usage: Primary text and strong contrast elements

typography.heading_style: Made For Display Bold for impact headlines
typography.observations: Heavy reliance on modern sans-serif fonts with multiple weight variations. Strong emphasis on readability with Poppins leading brand typography.

logo.description: Clean wordmark 'Imagine' in white on transparent background, minimal and modern
logo.usage_notes: Appears in multiple sizes, maintains readability at small scales

visual_style.photography_style: Professional corporate imagery with clean backgrounds
visual_style.layout_tendency: Clean, structured layouts with generous whitespace
visual_style.whitespace_usage: Abundant whitespace creating premium, uncluttered feel
visual_style.overall_aesthetic: Modern corporate with experiential design focus

sample_phrases: we create engaging visitor experiences that entertain, educate, and inspire
stories that resonate, moments that captivate, and experiences that fascinate

brand_positioning.target_audience: Entertainment venues, museums, corporate clients seeking immersive experiences
brand_positioning.value_proposition: Full-service experiential design from concept to operation
differentiators: High-profile client portfolio (Universal, Warner Bros, MGM)
Comprehensive expertise across planning, design, production, and operations

consistency_notes: Strong color consistency with clear hierarchy. Typography shows some fragmentation with multiple font families. Visual style maintains professional standard but could benefit from more distinctive brand elements beyond the wordmark.
recommendations_for_content_creation: Leverage the storytelling messaging theme - every piece should tell a story
Use the red accent (#B80021) sparingly for maximum impact on CTAs
Maintain generous whitespace to reflect premium positioning
Lead with client results and portfolio pieces given impressive client roster
Emphasize the 'concept to completion' service model in all communications
Use experiential language that mirrors their immersive design philosophy
